description: A vertical graphic on a gray background. A bold red stamp-style header at the top reads ARRESTED inside a red rectangle. Italic red text below states that USCIS assisted in a multi-agency immigration enforcement operation in Florida targeting criminal illegal aliens, including pedophiles, domestic abusers, drug offenders, and drunk drivers, with a closing line These were among the worst of the worst. Below the text is a grid of eight black-and-white booking-style portraits of men.
notable_text: ARRESTED; USCIS assisted in a multi-agency immigration enforcement operation in Florida; These were among the worst of the worst
